hero_subtitle: SFTY connects identity and corporate checks into a unified onboarding and compliance workflow that aligns with Singapore-specific regulatory rules and audit requirements.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule

problem_title: Compliance slows when KYC and KYB remain separate
problem_description: Singapore-facing onboarding and review operations struggle with disconnected KYC and KYB outputs from multiple providers. This fragmentation creates gaps in risk visibility, delays review cycles, and weakens audit traceability across compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates multiple KYC and KYB provider outputs into one jurisdiction-specific compliance workflow, centralizing risk data, review actions, case management and audit evidence for streamlined Singapore onboarding and regulatory oversight.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates KYC and KYB provider results, applies Singapore-specific rules, routes risk reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves approval evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented onboarding. Jurisdictional evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured review workflows, cases, decisions, and audit-ready evidence specific to Singapore’s regulatory environment.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing Singapore-specific KYC and KYB workflows with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and enterprise-grade deployment control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Singapore compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures Singapore-specific KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and regulatory outputs into a connected compliance workflow tailored for VASPs and digital asset businesses operating in this jurisdiction.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Singapore onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates provider outputs based on Singapore regulations, enabling risk-based routing, UBO reviews, and policy application within one workflow to streamline onboarding and compliance checks.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and evidence packages to support audit readiness and regulatory review specific to Singapore compliance requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC and KYB providers, aggregating their results into a single operational layer without disrupting your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers in Singapore?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows to help compliance teams manage Singapore’s regulatory expectations efficiently.
final_title: Structure Singapore KYC and KYB workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into connected onboarding, compliance cases and audit-ready evidence for Singapore VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
